questions.text: Which of the following describes a key bottleneck related to SQL Isolation Levels?
options: Inefficient scaling of Read Uncommitted, Read Committed, Repeatable Read, and Serializable mapping.
questions.correct_answer: Inefficient scaling of Read Uncommitted, Read Committed, Repeatable Read, and Serializable mapping.
questions.explanation: The topic covers how Read Uncommitted, Read Committed, Repeatable Read, and Serializable mapping scales under concurrent workloads, which represents the primary bottlenecks.
